description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by several large, leafy trees and bordered by low hedges. The house features a dark, multi-hipped roof and light-colored exterior walls, with a prominent front porch supported by columns. A driveway leads up to the house, with a car parked beside the entrance, and the landscaping is neatly maintained with trimmed bushes and paved walkways. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The overall setting suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood, with the house set back from the street and ample greenery providing privacy. The architectural style is traditional, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hipped roof, light walls, a front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and hedges with a driveway and car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway, car, and three large trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expanse of the roof, more trees, and the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by trees, with the back of the house and roof visible.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the driveway, car, and dense tree coverage around the house.
